title: Shin Chan

title: Shin Chan
desc: Misae wishes to knit a new sweater for Hiroshi and takes one of his old ones apart. However, with the wool, she ends up knitting a sweater for Shiro.

title: Shin Chan
desc: When Misae comes across her old school uniform, she puts it on. However, the principal of the kindergarten notices this and embarrasses her.

title: Shin Chan

desc: Misae plans out a diet she can follow to lose weight. However, her cravings get the better of her and she ends up overeating.
